CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(Source_Record_Id__c), null, HYPERLINK( '/' & Source_Record_Id__c, IF( ISBLANK(Source_Object_API_Name__c), Source_Record_Id__c, Source_Record_Id__c ), '_self' ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opens the record created or used by this delivery.
CustomField.label: Created Record Link
